construction.sampling_method: Stratified proportional random sample (floor + largest-fraction remainder). random.seed(7777); random.sample per episode. Episodes with 0 records (C1E114) contribute 0.

c1e114_zero_compression_status.note: C1E114 emitted 0 records from the Phase 3 extractor. Confirms recon finding (Q6 doc): Matt held all scenes open through the C1 climactic finale — zero compression events detected. Extractor-level confirmation of the "stale hold without follow-through" behavior documented in recon. C1E114 contributes 0 records to the gate sample.

construction.verdict_methodology: Blind judge pass by Claude against locked spec §4 taxonomy and §6 Stage 0 rules. Each record judged on: (a) extracted_category vs spec definition, (b) Stage 0 reject patterns (D1 OOC, D2 NPC-voice, D3 micro-motion, D4 recap-state), (c) condition-recovery polysemy vs overnight-rest, (d) surface_form and compression_scope correctness, (e) buildup_signal classification. expected_* filled in by judge; verdict_at_v1 = correct/wrong/defensible.
construction.raw_text_policy: raw_text retained at full (NOT stripped). preceding_turns_last5 carries the last 5 turns of preceding context so blind judging works without re-hydrating from source.

gate.raw_text: There is nothing to find purchase for, here. It's just a pit.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Perception check.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Keyleth-- Oh, never mind. Can anybody make it look like there's a big feast in front of him?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: 24? You do see what looks like some sort of mild glimmer of metal that amongst all the rest of the weapons and armor that have been destroyed down there, one seems to have resisted the age, that has stayed.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: I have a plain old 50-foot rope. I'm going to try to tie it to something on the edge.

gate.raw_text: So, back to the game at hand. You all, after an evening of taking turns resting the best you can, nothing catches your eye, although occasionally you see a little bit of movement, very slow movement just outside of your main light radius along the edge of the top of the pit you guys slept in. Just kind of fade in and out, something just drifted away. Eventually you all come to. Your Fomorian friend is just sitting there in a very unfriendly, aggressively passive manner, just staring at the rest of the group. Expectantly.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ZAC
preceding_turns_last5.text: Cool. Good game. Good game, bro.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Yeah, we hit 3,000 on the break! (cheering)

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ZAC
preceding_turns_last5.text: Yeah, that's impressive! You guys are awesome! So to enter in the giveaway you just have to be active in the chatroom. It could be as simple as just posting: 'I love Zac, he's great!' That's all you have to write.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Or Vex. Whoever.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ZAC
preceding_turns_last5.text: Or other people in the show, it's fine, whatever. So just be active in the chat room. I'm going to go! I'm going to let these guys do their thing. I don't want to give you guys any more interruptions until the show is over, so enjoy. Just watch the chat room for giveaways! Thank you!

gate.trigger_phrase: you make your way to here
gate.raw_text: Yeah, so you make your way to here. You kneel down with the Bad News. You aim for one of the weak points of the metal, bent and ruined from the swinging of the platform. You grabbed that horn, Grog.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: I'm going to pull over and make that shot. I'm going to steady myself, sit down, and I'm going to make that shot.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Okay. Bad News aimed up. You're aiming-- You're probably going to have to move around to this side.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: Fine.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Which is very careful, around the two of them-- Oh, actually, you'd probably go around this side.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: I go around the other way.

gate.trigger_phrase: You come to the conclusion that there is nothing
gate.raw_text: Okay. You come to the conclusion that there is nothing else to find in this room.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Percy is a paranoid rich person, so he knows things about them.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: Trust paranoid rich people to know.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Make a general investigation check throughout the room as you search for any nooks and crannies, hidden spaces.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: I rolled a one.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Well, investigation again? 20.

gate.raw_text: As this time has passed, you guys do return to the mansion, yeah.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns_last5.text: I want to be a monstah! (laughter)

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns_last5.text: All right!

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: All righty. So your strength is back up to 19 with the Gauntlets of Ogre Power. Beefy Pike is back.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns_last5.text: Yeah!

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: I also have-- wait, is Scanlan back? (sniffs) Do I smell poo?

gate.raw_text: Grog sprung awake, gathered the folks in the pre-dawn hour of the following morning. You gather your stuff, exit the mansion, and start making your way towards the Margrave's house.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns_last5.text: I give him a hug and a kiss on his cheek.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Okay.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: I kick the dirt a little bit and then I walk away and I click my heels. Little jump-and-click.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: And-- anything else, before the evening's rest comes? All right. Sleep finds you all, some easier than others, until a measured period of time, I believe?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: Yeah.

gate.raw_text: You guys exit Wilhand's place and there is a cross-street that Wilhand's home is nearby, that's like a building sandwiching it on each side, and the one just south of it is on the corner of that cross street. Across the way as you guys exit the room, or exit the front of the building, you see two figures stand up, arms crossed. The same individuals you saw earlier.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Grog sprung awake, gathered the folks in the pre-dawn hour of the following morning. You gather your stuff, exit the mansion, and start making your way towards the Margrave's house.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: Is there anyone on the street?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Make a perception check.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: 19. Plus zero.

gate.raw_text: Awesome. All right. So as the months go by and you all have your individual adventures, as you converse and talk amongst yourselves, the date of Winter's Crest begins to creep up. Now, Winter's Crest is a day that's really only celebrated in Tal'Dorei proper-- occasionally by people in other places who migrated away from Tal'Dorei, but the event that it's based around, Eravon the Ice Lord, was specific to Tal'Dorei. It's not celebrated everywhere in the world. However, it is coming up, and you all decided to celebrate your Winter's Crest festival this year, not in Tal'Dorei. You all instead made your way towards the Bay of Gifts, in Marquet.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Are you back? You were gone?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: All right, is that the end of that?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: And I wrote. A lot.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Yes.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Just a lot of writing, and I'm probably halfway through that book by now.

gate.trigger_phrase: you make your way to Emon
gate.raw_text: I don't know what those are. All right, so you make your way to Emon, then you charter a ship across the Ozmit Sea and make your way to the continent of Marquet. On the northeast base of the Aggrad Mountains of Marquet, which consume a sizable portion of the continent's north shore, there before you stands, as it comes across the horizon, a brilliant crescent-shaped bay of white sands, glittering clear turquoise-colored waters, and the grandiose port city of Shamal.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: And show us all the best gifs.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns_last5.text: Okay. (laughter)

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns_last5.text: I'll show you all the best jifs.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: That's okay too. That's okay too.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns_last5.text: Okay, just kidding. I don't say that.

gate.raw_text: Hundreds of ships fill the bay, from small fishing vessels to massive cargo ships, bringing an ever-flowing mixture of cultures, goods, and characters from across Exandria to its sunny location. Now, while back home Winter's Crest brings seasonal rain and snow, here in the Bay of Gifts the sky is clear, the water is warm, and the sun is ever-shining throughout the day. The streets of the city are draped in white and gold silks, affixed and framing crossways and street corners between torch posts and buildings. The distant sound of waves and seagulls cawing seems to envelop the city at all hours, occasionally stemmed by the sounds of localized musicians. So as you arrived here about midday or so, you take in the nice salty air into your lungs. You have your belongings, your sacks at your side, the city is bustling. What do you want to do with your vacation?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: (sings) Shamal. (laughter)

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Sorry.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: Holy crap.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: God damn it.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns_last5.text: Oh, man.

gate.trigger_phrase: Over the course of the evening
gate.raw_text: Okay. Over the course of the evening, the room gets cleaned as best as it can.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: I know you have to fiddle your dangle. I'm well aware.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: All right, I'll be right there to give him more specific instructions.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: We're going to sleep.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: I'm coming.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Do you improve the reception by moving it around?

gate.raw_text: Okay. Eventually, you all come to consciousness again, sore from the action of the previous day, but the daylight greets you, muddled as it is from the darkened grey raining skies that greet you. The thunderstorm is still passing through, and a quick glance out through the window into the main thoroughfare, you can see the streets are muddied, and in some places gathered into small pools and flooded puddles, but Yasha is gone.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: You see her pull back a bit. Another flash, a nearby bolt causes the sky to light up. Yasha's unfazed, and her attention shifts back to the glass of the window again, a brief moment of trance-like attention before, "You should try to sleep."

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Okay.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: You all right?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: She gives a nod and sits back down, closes her eyes, still sitting in a meditative position on the ground.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: I draw her lit up by the lightning and then I go to sleep.

gate.raw_text: "I need to go." He pushes past you, and as he begins to exit the chamber, he goes, "I'm all right, I'm good, thank you this time, good bye," and darts out into the rain.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Ooh, Shallow Breaths, that's a good one.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: As the guy turns around, you can see him. He's mid to late thirties, you would expect, dark hair slicked back, the hairline pulling back a bit, male pattern baldness-style, human, and as soon he whips around: "Oh, I'm just perusing."

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: It's not one of your favorites?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: "I don't know, I've not read it, I couldn't tell you."

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: What's your name?

gate.raw_text: At this point, you see Ulog make his way up and take a different table at the far corner. Then slowly, over the next 15 or so minutes, the other three exit the building.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: We should follow one of them.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Yeah, we don't know anything about this Dolan, this Horris' motives, or their agenda.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: We don't. While we're following them, perhaps we should try and find out what we can about this-- Lean in closer. Closer. This High-Richter Prucine.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Have the ones downstairs already left?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: I don't know.

gate.raw_text: You guys all eventually find yourselves to rest for the evening, awaking in the early morning. The chilled morning air comes through. The sky: still mostly gray, with patches of blue that poke through. No rain, it's still a little chilled. There's a bit of fog burning off by the time you awaken and look out your room's window. The morning is yours, what do you wish to do?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: That's so great.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: It's the most beautiful story, Beau!

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Can we go to sleep, now?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: Yeah, the hard turn!

gate.trigger_phrase: find yourselves to rest for the evening
gate.raw_text: You guys all eventually find yourselves to rest for the evening, awaking in the early morning. The chilled morning air comes through. The sky: still mostly gray, with patches of blue that poke through. No rain, it's still a little chilled. There's a bit of fog burning off by the time you awaken and look out your room's window. The morning is yours, what do you wish to do?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: That's so great.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: It's the most beautiful story, Beau!

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Can we go to sleep, now?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: Yeah, the hard turn!

gate.trigger_phrase: gather the last of your things, retrieve the horses, and head out
gate.raw_text: You gather the last of your things, retrieve the horses, and head out.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: No.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns_last5.text: All right.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns_last5.text: May I suggest something? When someone dies in my clan, we know that their spirit never leaves. It just gets returned to nature, which is why we protect nature so fiercely. I have lost people before. I find ways to see them in nature. Sometimes the leaves on the trees-- I pick one leaf and I know that it is a spirit waving to me. Your friend is here. He has not left.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: That is very lovely.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Yeah. I'm going to go start mounting up the horses.

gate.raw_text: As you guys gather up onto your horses, Keg takes the lead and you all begin your trek northward once more. Both memory of Mollymauk behind you on one shoulder, and the image of the face of your vengeance before you. You continue on your journey for the next hour or so before you catch a glance, Keg, at the road above. You see three shapes in the road.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Oh, you are a horse! Of course.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns_last5.text: I can turn into a horse once more. But if I do, I think that is the last time I can do it today.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Until you take a rest.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns_last5.text: Until my next rest.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Horse nap.

gate.raw_text: Well, you're lucky, because nothing of note happens during your watch. You are nervously keeping your eyes out, just in case, waiting for another reverse ambush, but nothing seems to catch your attention. As the morning comes to, because you guys managed to cuddle, I would like you all to make a constitution saving throw with advantage, please.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: I will.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: You and me, goblina.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Sure.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Make a perception check for me, please?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Oh boy. Four.

gate.raw_text: As you guys continue your trek northward for the next day, you slowly push forward and watch as the rolling hills of this northern valley begin to even out. The high grasses growing dense and dusted with snow in the wake of this snowstorm that has passed through the night. It's now this beautiful, ice topped wonderland before you. As the storm is past, breaks in the clouds begin to slowly emerge and show you glimmers of blue in the sky. With sunlight comes a welcome comparative warmth, and this dusted field of diamonds begins to slowly thaw over the midday's journey. The looming peaks of the Dunrock mountain range approach closer, engulfing your horizon almost like a toothy jaw of some ancient titan that surrounds your peripheral. You can make out, as you get closer, the craggy break in the mountains ahead, familiar to you. It's like a spiral fracture of a bone, where suddenly what was once a solid mountain range seems to have torn and sundered into two separate ravines that seem to share a similar shape. This you recognize as the Quannah Breach. You guys begin to approach, by mid to late afternoon, the front of the breach, where you can see six crownsguard in a small outpost built at the base of the Quannah Breach. These, as you know, are usually folks that essentially warn people from traveling into the Breach, and if they do, let them know that any return is going to be probably highly searched and highly inquired. They enforce it, unless you slip them some coin. Then it's not an issue on the way back. They're more there to make money.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: While the forest definitely keeps insulation to the storm, your body is well suited for extreme weather as well. Actually-- tricksy winter clothes, but you got it.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: No, you can--

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: No, you got them for a reason. That's what they're there for. Because of the body heat and everything, I'll allow it.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: You're like the little kid in A Christmas Story, "I can't put my arms down!"

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: So cute.

gate.raw_text: Cut to black.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Looking up the spell?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: No, something else. You're good. Go on, get it on.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: What's your name?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: "Vorsah." She pushes you in the room and closes the door.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Okay!

gate.trigger_phrase: You make your way to the top
gate.raw_text: As you guys are climbing, you see The Mistake is now being led over towards shore. You make your way to the top of the deck, and as you come across, one by one, you see there waiting for you is about ten figures, all in various scattered bits of seafaring attire, leathers and billowing cloths that seem to have seen many a journey out here on the open Lucidian Ocean. Immediately, your attention is grabbed by the central figure, a female elf, with light brown skin, with red, wild hair that falls in clustered strings around her face and down the back. You see she's wearing a long, sleeveless gray coat with a high collar that bends at the edge of the shoulders, with a thick scarf around her neck. You see she has heavy elbow-length gloves and knee-high boots that look weathered with use and probably brutality. They are stained in places where that could only have been acquired by meeting the face of somebody else. As you step up, she has her arms crossed in front of her, cocks her head to the side and looks to you specifically and goes, (french accent) "Well hello, Captain. You have returned from your journey, Jawgrasp?"

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: No, that's not right at all.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Okay.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: All right.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: You'll go first, Fjord?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: Sure. Yep, I mean, yes.

gate.raw_text: Continuing to ascend these steps one by one, they grow more and more narrow. You think you see an approaching surface of some kind. You're clear of the water, suddenly breaking the surface and you're standing in a dark stone chamber. You've managed to get all the way up standing within the ankle high water in the middle of the stone chamber and you watch, as all the liquid begins to drain. Until there's no more water around you. Revealing in the center of this chamber, an intricate circle in the ground, maybe two feet across. Beautiful ancient craftsmanship, detailed to depict a serpent body coiled. Carved eyes emerging from the creature's body every few inches. The center of the water is a circle of water, like a well. "Watching." What do you do?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: Witch Bolt, right to its chest.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: As the darkened energy arcs from the hilt of your blade, hitting it you watch as the cracks spider up the stone before it detonates into hundreds of shards of dark stone. You see half of the face slowly hit and clatter onto the stone before falling off to the side. Vandren. Do you continue up?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: The stairs, are they staying the same, is there anything at the foot of the statue after they break apart?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Looking down the statue itself is now immaterial. You've entirely annihilated it and you glance over the side, and what few shards still remain, slowly drift beyond your view into the dark abyss below.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: I'll move forward.

gate.raw_text: "Reward." And you wake up. [applause]

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: You watch as the ocean fires up like a spire, a pillar of solid ocean water. The ships are scattered in different directions, as it slams them down once more, scattering them into thousands of pieces of splintered wood.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: Can I take both hands and do a coup de grace, two big (crashing) over the top?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: The center of the ocean parts, giving this slight vacuum. This dual-sided, abyssal crevice in the center of the ocean. On the opposite ends of where your hands rise, you watch the waves rise up and in one fell sweep, two solid crystalline walls of water slam together and then even out. As the ripples subside, all you can see are the thousands and thousands of glittering shards of what once were that armada.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Moses shit.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: Don't wake up, don't wake up.

gate.raw_text: As the rest of you come to consciousness in the morning, Fjord seems to be sleeping in a little bit before suddenly shooting up with a gasp.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: "Reward." And you wake up. [applause]

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Wow, another dream with seamen scattered everywhere. [laughter]

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: It's somehow worse with that outfit.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: (laughing) Yes!

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: That's my people.
